title: Ship v9.2 External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate
description: Define and audit the pre-production boundary required before controlled provider execution is eligible: credential, budget, revocation, rollback, monitoring, incident, human go/no-go, product-value comprehension, and not-proven boundaries. Do not implement live provider execution.
triage_notes: v9.2 implementation, runtime proof, production-boundary audit, product value evidence, and release docs are ready for release validation.
